source_url: AI product manager daily work routine
english_script: Hi guys, it's Lulu. Day 9 of my daily English practice. I keep talking to improve my oral English. Today I watched a video about an AI product manager's daily work routine. The video shared what a day in this job looks like. It showed the main tasks and challenges. From this I learned that the day starts with checking data. The PM looks at user numbers and error reports. Then there is a morning meeting with the team. They talk about progress and problems. After that, the PM writes documents for new features. They also talk to engineers about how to build them. The PM tests new features before they go live. They listen to user feedback and plan changes. The video said good communication is very important. The PM must talk to many different people. They also need to think about business goals. It is a busy but interesting job. I found this very useful for my work. Thank you for listening, see you tomorrow.
chinese_translation: 嗨，大家好，我是Lulu。每天英语练习的第9天。我坚持说话来提高我的英语口语。今天我看了一个关于AI产品经理日常工作的视频。这个视频分享了这份工作的一天是什么样的。它展示了主要的任务和挑战。从中我了解到，一天从检查数据开始。产品经理查看用户数量和错误报告。然后是和团队的早会。他们讨论进展和问题。之后，产品经理为新功能写文档。他们还和工程师讨论如何构建这些功能。产品经理在新功能上线前进行测试。他们听取用户反馈并计划更改。视频说良好的沟通非常重要。产品经理需要和很多不同的人交流。他们还需要考虑商业目标。这是一份忙碌但有趣的工作。我觉得这对我的工作很有用。谢谢收听，明天见。
